summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Quasar Apps liquid glass UI effects and functionality. All major features working correctly with beautiful glass effects implemented throughout the site.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with cosmic background and liquid glass styling
Navigation glass effect activates on scroll (blur, gradient background)
Navigation returns to transparent when scrolled back to top
Services section displays 6 glass cards with proper liquid glass effects
Service cards have hover effects and glass styling
Case studies section loads with 3 clickable glass cards
Case study card navigation works correctly
About section stat cards (4) have liquid glass styling and hover effects
Testimonials glass container has proper liquid glass effects
Contact form submission works and clears form after success
Contact form has liquid glass styling and input focus effects
Team section has 4 team glass cards with proper styling
Button glass effects (primary and secondary) work on hover
Input glass effects work on focus
Mobile responsive design maintains glass effects
All 8 glass element types found and working (.glass-card, .glass-nav, .service-icon-glass, .team-glass-card, .testimonial-glass, .contact-glass, .stat-glass, .case-study-glass)
Backend API endpoints all working (8/8 tests passed)
Contact form backend integration working correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all liquid glass effects and functionality working)
